phase_npi.trigger_behavior: AFTER UPDATE OF npi_verified — inserts market_signals row (vertical=medspa, topic=market_data, tier_min=free) when npi_verified transitions to TRUE
phase_npi.note: NPI verification now creates an operator-intelligence signal loop. No NPI verifications in DB yet — trigger tested via migration, fires on next real verification.

bugs_fixed_during_deployment: confidence_tier was 'tier_1' but CHECK constraint requires 'high'|'medium'|'low' — fixed to 'high'
FDA date_received in YYYYMMDD format not parseable by new Date() — added safeIso() helper
magnitude column is numeric not text — fixed 'high'/'medium'/'low' to 0.9/0.6/0.3
confidence column is numeric not text — fixed 'high' to 0.95
data_source column is UUID FK not text — removed from insert rows
confidence_score normalized to 0-1 scale to match existing row convention

run_result.note: FDA cosmetics enforcement returned 0 results this run (normal — API returns empty for some query windows). 50 aesthetic device MDR signals + 1 cosmetics recall inserted.

phase_openfda.license: Public domain — US government works (17 U.S.C. §105)

Alternative: use OpenRouter embedding model (e.g. text-embedding-3-small via openrouter) if owner sets OPENAI_API_KEY or reconfigures function for OpenRouter.
notes: All three free-data sources operational. OBF ingredients table already populated (2,950 rows).
